title: pavonia secreta
intro: Pavonia secreta, also known as the secret rose mallow, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Malvaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, thanks to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Pavonia secreta are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
